# Caching.ExpiresAt method

Computes `expiresAt` — the absolute client-local timestamp after which the result is stale (`receivedAt + ttlMs`). Mirrors TS `expiresAt`. (R-13.2-e/f)

```csharp
public static long ExpiresAt(long ttlMs, long receivedAt)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| ttlMs | The non-negative freshness hint. |
| receivedAt | The local receive timestamp (ms). |

## Return Value

The absolute expiry timestamp (ms).
